20:124:11.m: the resurrection (specifically the Day of Judgment, being described in this ayah)

قِيٰمَةِ: resurrection (specifically the Day of Judgment, being described in this ayah)

20:124:12.m: blind (in relation to يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Judgment)

20:125:2.m: O my Lord! (being called out to)

20:125:3.m: why (asking about the reason he was raised blind)

20:125:8.m: seeing/understanding clearly (as a state of كُنتُ)

20:126:2.m: like that (referring to how the person ignored Allah's signs)

كَ: (referring to how the person ignored Allah's signs)

20:126:3.m: she came to you (referring to the signs/verses mentioned in ءَايٰتُنَا)

20:126:5.m: so you forgot/neglected it (referring to Allah's signs)

20:126:6.m: and like that (referring to how the person ignored Allah's signs)

20:127:1.m: and like that (referring to the punishment mentioned before)

20:127:2.m: we repay (those who أَسْرَفَ - exceeded limits)

20:127:6.m: he believes (in آيٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ - signs of his Lord)

20:127:9.m: and surely the punishment (subject of أَشَدُّ)

20:128:2.m: he guides (in a conditional or command context)

هْدِ: guides (in a conditional or command context)

20:128:14.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to the previous statement about destroyed nations)

كَ: refers to the previous statement about destroyed nations

20:128:16.m: for those who possess (connected to ءَايٰتٍ)

20:129:7.m: as a binding necessity (predicate of كَانَ)

20:130:1.m: so be patient! (in response to what they say)

20:130:5.m: and glorify! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

20:130:6.m: with praise (connected to رَبِّكَ - your Lord)

20:130:18.m: of the day (part of أَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ - ends of the day)

20:130:19.m: perhaps you (will be satisfied with تَرْضَىٰ)

20:130:20.m: you will be pleased (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

20:131:2.m: you must definitely not extend (negative command with لا)

20:131:3.m: your two eyes (object of do not extend)

20:131:5.m: what/that which (connects to مَتَّعْنَا - we provided)

20:131:7.m: with it/him (referring to what was given to others)

20:131:8.m: pairs/spouses (as object of مَتَّعْنَا - we provided)

20:131:13.m: so that we may test them

20:132:2.m: your family (object of وَأْمُرْ - and command)

20:132:4.m: and endure! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

20:132:8.m: provision (object of نَسْـَٔلُكَ - we ask you for)

ًا: (object of نَسْـَٔلُكَ - we ask you for)

20:133:4.m: with a sign (object of يَأْتِينَا - he comes to us)

20:133:5.m: from (connects رَّبِّهِ to what came before)

20:134:7.m: they would surely say (in response to أَهْلَكْنٰهُم - if We had destroyed them)

20:134:8.m: our Lord (being addressed in قَالُوا they said)

20:134:12.m: a messenger (object of أَرْسَلْتَ - you sent)

20:135:3.m: one who waits and watches intensively (subject of قُلْ)

20:135:4.m: so all of you wait watchfully (command to multiple people)

وا: all of you (command to multiple people)

20:135:8.m: of the path (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - people/companions)

20:135:9.m: the very straight/proper one (referring to the path)
